name: Element
description: A glossy Matrix client compatible with Synapse
compose:
name: slashnode-element
services:
  web:
    image: vectorim/element-web:v1.12.22
    container_name: element
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8088:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
